description: A Python scheduling bot running in Docker at /home/ga/scheduler-bot/ is behaving incorrectly. It logs time in UTC instead of the required 'America/New_York' timezone and crashes with a UnicodeEncodeError when processing users with non-ASCII names. Fix the Docker configuration so the bot uses the 'America/New_York' timezone and supports UTF-8 encoding. Verify the fix by ensuring the logs show the correct local time and that the user 'Raphaël' is processed successfully without crashing.
